message.content:
I need to verify the exact float constants and get the full vector_normalize function. My earlier perl extraction may have had issues.

{"analysis":"The perl float extraction may have had byte order issues. Let me verify key constants and get the full vector_normalize function to understand the camera model precisely.","plan":"1. Extract key float constants using dd+od
2. Get full vector_normalize disassembly
3. Write the C program","commands":[{"keystrokes":"dd if=/app/mystery bs=1 skip=$((0x80044)) count=4 2>/dev/null | od -A n -t f4
","duration":0.1},{"keystrokes":"dd if=/app/mystery bs=1 skip=$((0x80040)) count=4 2>/dev/null | od -A n -t f4
","duration":0.1},{"keystrokes":"dd if=/app/mystery bs=1 skip=$((0x8003c)) count=4 2>/dev/null | od -A n -t f4
","duration":0.1},{"keystrokes":"dd if=/app/mystery bs=1 skip=$((0x85a58)) count=16 2>/dev/null | od -A n -t f4
","duration":0.1},{"keystrokes":"objdump -d --no-show-raw-insn /app/mystery | sed -n '/^00000000004020a0 </,/ret$/p' | head -30
","duration":0.1}]}
